# Seeker OS — API Reference

**Last updated:** 2026-06-27
**Base URL:** `http://localhost:8000`
**OpenAPI docs:** `http://localhost:8000/docs` (auto-generated by FastAPI)

All endpoints are prefixed with `/api`. Request/response bodies are JSON. SSE endpoints
return `text/event-stream`.

---

## Health & Logs

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/` | Root — returns API name, version, docs URL |
| `GET` | `/api/health` | Health check — returns `{"status": "ok"}` |
| `GET` | `/api/logs?tail=80` | Last N lines of backend log file |

---

## Jobs (`/api/jobs`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/jobs` | List jobs — filter by status, min_score, min_tier, company, source, limit |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs` | Manually add a job (manual_created event) |
| `GET` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}` | Full job detail — all fields, score, research, analysis |
| `PATCH` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}` | Update job status, notes, or pinned state (status_changed event) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}` | Delete job + all dependent records (resumes, events, research, analyses) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/reject` | Reject with reason (rejected event) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/skip` | Skip — removes from active queue (skipped event) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/override` | Override a rejection — auditable (overridden event) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/apply` | Mark as applied (applied event, actor=candidate) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/transition` | Post-apply status transition (company_rejected, withdrawn, engaged, offer_accepted, offer_declined) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/engaged-events` | Log engaged sub-lifecycle event without changing status (interview, challenge_*, offer_*, followup_sent, contact_received) |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/clean-start` | Enter a job directly at a post-apply status with a backdated event |
| `GET` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/events` | Get job's event timeline ordered by occurred_at |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/events` | Add an event to a job's timeline |
| `GET` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/cross-ref` | Check job against cross-reference repo |
| `GET` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/analysis` | Get latest cached JD analysis |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/analysis` | Run JD analysis for a job (LLM-powered) |
| `GET` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/company-research` | Get cached company research |
| `POST` | `/api/jobs/{job_id}/company-research?force_refresh=false` | Run company research (retrieval + LLM dossier + URL verification) |

---

## Pipeline (`/api/pipeline`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `POST` | `/api/pipeline/run` | Trigger pipeline run — body: `{queries?, tiers?, dry_run?}` |
| `POST` | `/api/pipeline/run/stream` | Pipeline run with SSE progress streaming |
| `POST` | `/api/pipeline/run/tier/{tier}` | Run a specific tier only (1-5) |
| `GET` | `/api/pipeline/runs?limit=20` | List pipeline run history |
| `GET` | `/api/pipeline/runs/{run_id}` | Get details of a specific pipeline run |

---

## Queries (`/api/queries`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/queries` | List all search queries |
| `POST` | `/api/queries` | Create a new search query |
| `PATCH` | `/api/queries/{query_id}` | Update a search query |
| `DELETE` | `/api/queries/{query_id}` | Delete a search query |
| `POST` | `/api/queries/{query_id}/run` | Run a single query (Tier 1 only) |

---

## Resumes (`/api/resumes`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/resumes/master` | Get info about configured master resume file |
| `POST` | `/api/resumes/master/upload` | Upload a master resume file (md, docx, pdf) |
| `POST` | `/api/resumes/parse` | Parse master resume with LLM to extract structured profile data |
| `GET` | `/api/resumes?job_id=&limit=50` | List generated resumes (optional job_id filter) |
| `GET` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}` | Full resume detail — text, validation, metadata |
| `PUT` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}` | Update resume text (inline edit, also updates markdown file) |
| `DELETE` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}` | Delete resume from DB + remove associated files |
| `POST` | `/api/resumes/generate` | Generate a tailored resume for a job — body: `{job_id, task, temperature, max_tokens}` |
| `POST` | `/api/resumes/generate/stream` | Generate resume with SSE progress streaming |
| `POST` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}/validate` | Re-run accuracy validation on a stored resume |
| `DELETE` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}/exports` | Clear cached PDF and DOCX exports |
| `GET` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}/pdf` | Download PDF version |
| `GET` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}/markdown` | Download markdown source |
| `GET` | `/api/resumes/{resume_id}/docx` | Download DOCX version |

---

## LLM Models (`/api/models`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/models` | Get all providers, models, tier mappings, task overrides |
| `POST` | `/api/models/fetch/{provider_id}` | Fetch models from provider's API and cache |
| `POST` | `/api/models/test/{provider_id}` | Test connectivity to a provider |
| `POST` | `/api/models/test-all` | Test all configured providers |
| `PUT` | `/api/models/providers/{provider_id}` | Update provider settings (writes to providers.yml) |
| `PUT` | `/api/models/tiers/{tier}` | Update tier mapping in providers.yml |
| `PUT` | `/api/models/tasks/{task}` | Update task override in providers.yml |
| `POST` | `/api/models/anthropic/oauth/initiate` | Start Anthropic OAuth PKCE flow — returns auth URL |
| `POST` | `/api/models/anthropic/oauth/callback` | Exchange OAuth code for tokens — body: `{code}` |
| `GET` | `/api/models/anthropic/oauth/status` | Check local OAuth token status |

---

## Profile, Filters & Accuracy Rules (`/api`)

Router prefix is `/api` — these endpoints are at the top level, not under `/api/profile`.

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/profile` | Get full profile configuration |
| `PUT` | `/api/profile` | Update profile configuration (writes to profile.yml) |
| `GET` | `/api/filters` | Get filter configuration + title filters |
| `PUT` | `/api/filters` | Update filter configuration (writes to filters.yml) |
| `GET` | `/api/accuracy-rules` | Get all accuracy rules from accuracy_rules.yml |
| `PUT` | `/api/accuracy-rules` | Replace all accuracy rules in accuracy_rules.yml |
| `POST` | `/api/accuracy-rules/ai-generate` | Generate accuracy rules from natural language description using LLM |

---

## Company Research Settings (`/api/settings`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/settings/company-research` | Get retrieval settings (sanitized — no API key) |
| `PUT` | `/api/settings/company-research` | Update retrieval settings (API key → .env, reference → company_research.yml) |
| `POST` | `/api/settings/company-research/test-connection` | Test that configured retrieval adapter is reachable |

---

## Settings (`/api/settings`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/settings` | Get all configuration (sanitized — no API keys) |
| `GET` | `/api/settings/{key}` | Get a specific setting from the settings table |
| `PATCH` | `/api/settings/{key}` | Update a setting in the settings table |

## Analytics (`/api/analytics`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/analytics/funnel` | Pipeline funnel stats — cumulative counts at each tier and by status |
| `GET` | `/api/analytics/calibration` | Scoring calibration report — rubric scores vs. actual apply/skip decisions |
| `GET` | `/api/analytics/response-rate` | Response rate stats (application tracking) |

### `GET /api/analytics/calibration`

Joins the jobs table (`score`, `research_adjusted_score`, `net_score`,
`analysis_verdict`) against the `application_events` log to derive the user's
actual decision per job — `applied` (candidate `applied` event), `skipped`
(candidate `skipped` or `rejected` event), or `ignored` (no decision
recorded). The event log is authoritative; job status is not consulted.
Jobs are bucketed by their effective net score (`net_score` →
`research_adjusted_score` → `score` fallback); jobs with no score are counted
in `total_unscored` and excluded.

Query params:

| Param | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `bucket_width` | config `calibration.bucket_width` (1.0) | Net-score bucket width for this request; must be > 0 |

Response (`CalibrationReport`):

| Field | Description |
|---|---|
| `buckets` | Score-bucket vs. decision-rate table: per bucket, counts and percentages of applied/skipped/ignored |
| `false_positives` | High-score-but-skipped jobs (net ≥ `high_score_threshold`), worst first — each with the fired base-score pattern, positive/negative modifiers, research factors, and verdict |
| `false_negatives` | Low-score-but-applied jobs (net < `low_score_threshold`), lowest first — same inspectable breakdown |
| `modifier_precision` | Per rubric signal: of jobs where it fired, the fraction applied to (`precision`), `decided_precision` (applied / applied+skipped), and `lift` (precision / `base_apply_rate` — the meaningful read for broad signals; > 1 selects for applies, null when no applies yet) |

Bucket width and miss thresholds come from `scoring_rubric.yml` (`calibration`
section); thresholds default to `post_threshold` when unset. Returns `409` if
no scoring rubric is configured.

---

## Backup & Restore (`/api/backup`)

| Method | Path | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `GET` | `/api/backup` | Download a zip of all non-DB configuration files |
| `POST` | `/api/backup/restore` | Upload a backup zip and restore all config files (creates pre-restore snapshot) |
| `GET` | `/api/backup/db` | Download a consistent snapshot of the SQLite database |
| `POST` | `/api/backup/db/restore` | Upload a .db file and restore it into the live database |

---

## SSE Event Format

Endpoints with `/stream` suffix return Server-Sent Events (`text/event-stream`):

```
data: {"type":"progress","step":"discovery","message":"Fetching query...","status":"started"}\n\n
data: {"type":"progress","step":"scoring","message":"Scored 15 jobs","status":"completed"}\n\n
event: done\ndata: {"run_id":"...","cards_fetched":42,"cards_new":12,"jobs_ready":8}\n\n
```

Error events:
```
event: error\ndata: {"error":"Pipeline timeout"}\n\n
```
